svg.title: DNN and PDR MCMC — full dependency tree, three-column layout
svg.desc: Dark-themed three-column dependency diagram. Left: DNN-specific chain. Center: shared modules. Right: PDR-specific chain. Dashed lines show shared imports via a bus connector.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does mcmc_with_dnn_updated_new.py do and how is it structured?')
sendPrompt('How does log_prob_dnn11d.py compute the log-likelihood using ensemble_da?')
sendPrompt('How does dnn_emulator_11d.py load the checkpoint and predict?')
sendPrompt('What keys are stored in dnn11d_model.pt?')
sendPrompt('What does mcmc_with_pdr11d.py do and how does it differ from the DNN MCMC?')
sendPrompt('How does log_prob_pdr11d.py use diagonal Gaussian with caching?')
sendPrompt('How does pdr_emulator_11d.py predict using the vectorised legval and phi @ C_six?')
sendPrompt('What keys are stored in pdr11d_model.npz?')
sendPrompt('What does surrogate_config_11d.py export to both pipelines?')
sendPrompt('When is crm_eval_11d_six called and what does it return?')
sendPrompt('What shared utilities does mcmc_utils.py provide to both pipelines?')

svg.text: click any box to explore · dashed border = runtime artifact · dashed line = shared import
